title: Korak 19

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should raise a ValueError with the message Seasons must be 1 or greater when seasons is less than 1.
You should not raise a ValueError when seasons is a valid number.
You should raise a ValueError with the message Total episodes must be 1 or greater when total_episodes is less than 1.
You should not raise a ValueError when total_episodes is a valid number.

description:
Sada, dopunite svoju metodu __init__ validiranjem seasons i total_episodes. Kreirajte izjavu if koja proverava da li je seasons manje od 1 i izvlači ValueError sa porukom Seasons must be 1 or greater.

Zatim, uradite isto za validaciju total_episodes. Ovog puta koristite poruku Total episodes must be 1 or greater.
